description_long: An adult pedestrian is depicted standing upright, wearing a fitted jacket and slim jeans. The individual has on a pair of lace-up sneakers with a distinct color contrast on the toe and heel areas. The posture is relaxed, with arms resting by the sides and legs straight. The hairstyle is short and neatly styled, with no visible accessories or headwear. No objects are being carried or held, and the clothing style is casual and suitable for an urban environment. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with attention to detail in the clothing fit and footwear design.
description: A casually dressed adult stands upright in fitted outerwear, slim jeans, and lace-up sneakers, with a neat short hairstyle and no carried items.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, jacket, slim jeans, and sneakers with visible laces and toe details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fitted jacket, and the side of the sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, jacket, jeans, and the heels of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile from the opposite side, with the same clothing and footwear details as the left.
attribute_clothing_type: casual fitted jacket and slim jeans
